translation: (8) From 2019 onwards, annualized new premium and new business value for other markets include our share of results from our 49% stake in Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life). Annualized new premium and new business value reported for 2018 and prior have not been restated and do not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life. From 2019 onwards, the Group's new business value excludes new business value attributable to non-controlling interests. New business value for 2018 and prior has not been restated and, as previously disclosed, was not adjusted for non-controlling interests. Tata AIA Life's IFRS results are accounted for using the equity method. The Group's consolidated financial statements use Tata AIA Life financial information on a one-quarter lag basis. For clarity, total weighted premium income does not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life.
